208.rule: Find two equal 2..5 by 2..5 black rectangles in a 21x21 noisy grid; copy the first rectangle's colored one-cell frame to the second.
208.history_inventory: Three below-current static candidates were re-screened by agent_clean95_all; all are nonstatic and private-zero lineage.
208.best_nominal_failure: 0/266 known with 266 runtime errors and 0/3000 fresh with 3000 runtime errors (Slice allocator shape mismatch).
208.sound_reference_prior_evidence: known complete; generator reference 1000/1000; ONNX fresh 1000/1000; checker/strict pass
208.decision: No sound strict-cheaper candidate. Private-zero candidates cannot meet the 100% multiple-seed guarantee.

255.rule: Recover green interiors of several artery/vein rectangles after every green cell has been replaced by black in the input.
255.history_inventory: 60 unique historical candidates were present in the current rescreen; all lower static families fail actual-cost or structural/private-zero policy gates.

noninjective_proof.witness: bottom-clipped low-right vein, tall=3 versus tall=4

255.decision: No deterministic input-only ONNX can be generator-exact; therefore no private-zero candidate can receive a pass guarantee.

44.rule: There are two gray containers with black holes and two translated external colored creatures; erase the external creatures and paint each matching creature color into its container holes while preserving unrelated dust.
44.history_inventory: 112 unique historical SHA values: 106 cost-floor rejects at or above old cost 1087, one old base, three structural rejects, two unscorable; no model below the new cost 1086.
44.decision: No strict-cheaper candidate exists in the exhaustive history frontier; a universally exact inverse is not generator-entailed.

additional_attempts.attempt: Narrow GatherND indices from int64 to int32 to save 400 intermediate bytes.
additional_attempts.result: Rejected before serialization: ONNX opset-23 GatherND checker reports tensor(int32) as unsupported; retained the validated int64 model.
